parameters.formDescription: Enter test data to simulate EPR compliance check

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json; // HTML Signature - Your Outlook signature const LOGO_URL = 'https://i.imgur.com/v6diEdK.jpg'; const BANNER_URL = 'https://i.imgur.com/HfkbUwp.png'; const CALENDLY_LINK = 'https://calendly.com/christian-olesen-usan/30min'; const SIGNATURE_HTML = `

Thank you,


Christian Olesen

Member Services Specialist

REDACTED_PHONE

undergroundservicealert.org

4005 Port Chicago Hwy #100 Concord, CA 94520

Christian's Availability



This message contains confidential information and is intended only for the intended recipients. If you are not an intended recipient you should not disseminate, distribute or copy this e-mail. Please notify us immediately by e-mail if you have received this e-mail by mistake and delete this e-mail from your system.

`; // Build personalized email body const emailBody = `

${data.first_name},

Your current EPR response rate: ${data.response_rate}% (${data.epr_posted} of ${data.tickets_received} tickets)

Just reaching out because Electronic Positive Responses are still not being posted on the tickets that ${data.member_name} is receiving.

4216.3.(c) (1) (A) Every operator shall supply an electronic positive response through the regional notification center before the legal excavation start date and time. — California Government Code 4216

To be in compliance you will need to post EPR on all tickets that you have received. By being out of compliance, mandatory training and/or fines can be imposed by the Underground Safety Board.

To post EPR on the tickets that you receive please login to the Damage Prevention Portal and follow the instructions in our video:

  • CA DPP Login: https://appsca.undergroundservicealert.org/pcadmin/Account/Login
  • How to use Electronic Positive Response: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c1b6HlX-fx4

If you would like to schedule a meeting with me, here is my availability: Schedule a Meeting

Please let me know if you have any questions.

${SIGNATURE_HTML} `; const subject = `${data.first_name}, EPR Compliance - Action Required (${data.response_rate}%)`; return [{ json: { status: 'EMAIL PREVIEW - NON-COMPLIANT', to: data.email, to_name: data.first_name, subject: subject, body: emailBody, compliance_data: { member_name: data.member_name, station_code: data.station_code, response_rate: data.response_rate + '%', tickets_received: data.tickets_received, epr_posted: data.epr_posted, threshold: data.threshold + '%', below_by: data.below_threshold_by + '%' } } }];
